tools.name: ping
tools.title: Ping
tools.description: Health check for the MyFinance MCP connection.

tools.name: log_expense
tools.title: Log expense
tools.description: Record ONE purchase, bill, or receipt. Negative amount = refund to the same category. NEVER use this for bank-statement rows or any batch of 3+ records: use import_transactions with the whole array instead (one-by-one logging hits the per-turn tool limit).

amount.description: Amount spent in the original currency. Negative = refund.

currency.description: 3-letter ISO currency code (EUR, USD, UAH, AED, ...). Omit to use the user's base currency.

category.description: Omit only if nothing fits; defaults to 'other'.

date.description: Date as YYYY-MM-DD. Omit for today.

price.description: Line price in the receipt's currency

items.description: Receipt line items, when logging from a receipt photo.

entity.description: Override the account's default scope, e.g. a personal dinner paid with the business card.

tools.name: log_income
tools.title: Log income
tools.description: Record incoming money: salary, client payment, gift.

amount.description: Amount received in the original currency.

currency.description: 3-letter ISO currency code (EUR, USD, UAH, AED, ...). Omit to use the user's base currency.

merchant.description: Payer / source, e.g. client or employer name.

date.description: Date as YYYY-MM-DD. Omit for today.

entity.description: Override the account's default scope, e.g. a client payment landing on a personal card.

tools.name: create_account
tools.title: Create account
tools.description: Add a money account: bank, card, cash, or investment (brokerage). Transfers between own accounts are then tracked without counting as spending.

entity.description: Whose money: personal (default) or business. Sets the default scope for this account's transactions.

tools.name: get_accounts
tools.title: Accounts & net worth
tools.description: All accounts with computed balances (latest snapshot + tracked flows) and total net worth in the base currency. Optionally filtered to personal or business scope.

entity.description: Only accounts of this scope. Omit for all.

tools.name: log_transfer
tools.title: Log transfer
tools.description: Move money between OWN accounts: card to brokerage, cash withdrawal, currency exchange. Never counted as spending or income.

received_currency.description: 3-letter ISO currency code (EUR, USD, UAH, AED, ...). Omit to use the user's base currency.

date.description: Date as YYYY-MM-DD. Omit for today.

tools.name: log_balance
tools.title: Log balance snapshot
tools.description: Anchor an account's REAL balance at end of a date (from the bank app). Balances are then snapshot + later flows.

amount.description: Actual balance shown by the bank/broker.

date.description: Balance as of end of this date. Default: today.

tools.name: import_transactions
tools.title: Bulk import
tools.description: Import bank-statement / statement-screenshot rows in bulk. ALWAYS send the ENTIRE statement as ONE call with the full transactions array (up to 500 rows) - never split into chunks, never log rows one-by-one via log_expense. If one statement truly cannot fit in a single call, EVERY row of EVERY chunk must carry external_id (bank reference; or the statement row number, e.g. 'r017') - rows without external_id are keyed by amount+date+occurrence WITHIN one call, so identical rows arriving in different calls are indistinguishable from re-imports. Safe to re-run: keyed rows are skipped, a hand-logged twin is merged into the bank row instead of duplicating, and repeated purchases (same merchant and amount on different days, or twice the same day) import normally. Unknown categories become 'other'. Pass statement_total to get a reconciliation check. Sign convention: negative amount = money out, positive = money in.

statement_total.description: Signed sum of ALL rows in the source statement, for reconciliation.

dry_run.description: Preview only: report what would be imported/skipped/merged without writing anything.

date.description: Date as YYYY-MM-DD. Omit for today.

currency.description: 3-letter ISO currency code (EUR, USD, UAH, AED, ...). Omit to use the user's base currency.

external_id.description: Bank transaction reference - the strongest dedup key. If absent, the server derives a stable key from amount + date + position.

force.description: Import even if a similar row exists. Use ONLY when a previous response's hint asked to re-send this row. Exact external_id duplicates are still skipped.

entity.description: Scope override for THIS row, e.g. a personal dinner inside a business-account statement. Default: the account's entity.

tools.name: get_summary
tools.title: Spending summary
tools.description: Totals for a period, computed server-side in the user's base currency. Breaks down expenses (default) or income: 'how much did I spend on X in July', 'what does my June income consist of'. Supports category drill-down (category=subscriptions + group_by=merchant) and exclusions (exclude_categories).

period.description: YYYY-MM or YYYY. Defaults to the current month.

from.description: Date as YYYY-MM-DD. Omit for today.

to.description: Date as YYYY-MM-DD. Omit for today.

type.description: Which side the groups break down. Default: expense. Use income for 'where does my income come from'.

category.description: Only this category, e.g. subscriptions with group_by=merchant to see what the subscriptions consist of.

exclude_categories.description: Drop these categories from totals and groups, e.g. ['business'] for personal stats without business-categorized records.

entity.description: personal or business only. Omit for everything.

tools.name: get_transactions
tools.title: List transactions
tools.description: Find records: 'what was that 40 eur charge', recent spending, by category or merchant.

from.description: Date as YYYY-MM-DD. Omit for today.

to.description: Date as YYYY-MM-DD. Omit for today.

tools.name: update_transaction
tools.title: Update transaction
tools.description: Fix a logged record: wrong category, amount, merchant, date, or personal/business scope.

currency.description: 3-letter ISO currency code (EUR, USD, UAH, AED, ...). Omit to use the user's base currency.

date.description: Date as YYYY-MM-DD. Omit for today.

tools.name: delete_transaction
tools.title: Delete transaction
tools.description: Remove ONE wrongly logged record. For 3+ records use delete_transactions (bulk) with the ids array.

tools.name: delete_transactions
tools.title: Bulk delete
tools.description: Delete MANY transactions in ONE call by ids (from get_transactions). Always prefer this over repeated delete_transaction calls - one-by-one deletion hits the per-turn tool limit.

tools.name: get_trends
tools.title: Monthly trends
tools.description: Month-over-month expense/income dynamics, optionally for one category or scope.

entity.description: personal or business only. Omit for everything.

tools.name: set_budget
tools.title: Set budget
tools.description: Monthly spending cap, overall or per category, in the user's base currency.

category.description: Omit for the overall monthly budget.

tools.name: get_budget_progress
tools.title: Budget progress
tools.description: Current month: spent vs cap for every budget. Budgets track PERSONAL spending only; business-scope transactions never count against them.

tools.name: get_settings
tools.title: Get settings
tools.description: Base currency and timezone.

tools.name: update_settings
tools.title: Update settings
tools.description: Change base currency (recomputes all historical stats at each transaction's original date rate) or timezone.

base_currency.description: 3-letter ISO currency code (EUR, USD, UAH, AED, ...). Omit to use the user's base currency.

tools.name: export_transactions
tools.title: Export CSV
tools.description: All transactions as CSV (GDPR portability). Optionally one scope only, e.g. business rows for the accountant.

from.description: Date as YYYY-MM-DD. Omit for today.

to.description: Date as YYYY-MM-DD. Omit for today.

tools.name: connect_zenmoney
tools.title: Connect ZenMoney
tools.description: Link a ZenMoney account (both zenmoney.app international and zenmoney.ru work; the right backend is auto-detected) for read-only transaction sync. action=paste_token stores the user's personal ZenMoney API token: get it free at zerro.app - log in choosing YOUR ZenMoney version on the login screen, then open zerro.app/token and copy it. action=status shows connection health and synced accounts. action=disconnect removes the link and stored token; already-imported transactions stay. After connecting, run sync_zenmoney.

token.description: ZenMoney API token. Required for action=paste_token.

tools.name: sync_zenmoney
tools.title: Sync ZenMoney
tools.description: Pull transactions, accounts and balances from the linked ZenMoney account (read-only, incremental after the first run, safe to re-run). First sync imports full history unless months_back is set. dry_run previews transaction changes (account mapping is still saved). Report includes unmapped ZenMoney tags: those rows land in category 'other' for the user to review.

dry_run.description: Preview transaction changes without writing them.

months_back.description: First sync only: import history no older than this many months. Default: everything.

tools.name: connect_bank
tools.title: Connect a bank
tools.description: Link a real bank account via open banking (Enable Banking, EU/UK/EEA coverage) for read-only transaction sync. Flow: action=list_banks with the user's country (and optional search) to find the exact bank name -> action=start with bank_name + country -> give the user the returned authorize_url to open and approve at their bank -> after they confirm they are done, run sync_bank. action=status shows connection health and consent expiry. action=disconnect revokes the session and removes the link; imported transactions stay. Only one bank connection at a time for now; connecting a different bank replaces the previous one after disconnect.

country.description: 2-letter country code (FI, DE, FR, ...). Required for list_banks and start.

search.description: list_banks: case-insensitive substring filter on bank names.

bank_name.description: start: exact bank name as returned by list_banks. Required for action=start.

tools.name: sync_bank
tools.title: Sync bank
tools.description: Pull booked transactions and balances from the connected bank (via connect_bank; read-only, incremental, safe to re-run). First sync imports months_back of history (default 3; banks may return less). Equal-amount same-day debit/credit pairs across the user's own synced accounts are merged into transfers. Rows without a recognizable MCC land in category 'other'.

months_back.description: First sync only: how many months of history to request. Default 3.

tools.name: delete_account
tools.title: Delete account
tools.description: Erase the account and ALL financial data permanently (GDPR). Requires confirm='DELETE'.

resources.name: dashboard
resources.description: MyFinance MCP dashboard: budgets, trends, summary, accounts
